'''vayava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ngapee|ngapee]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-y-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ngapee|ngapee]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| vayava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:væyævæth|væyævæth]] || [[word:væyævæj|væyævæj]] || [[word:væyævæsh|væyævæsh]] || [[word:væyævæ|væyævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:vayayavath|vayayavath]] || [[word:vayayavaj|vayayavaj]] || [[word:vayayavash|vayayavash]] || [[word:vayayava|vayayava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:vayavath|vayavath]] || [[word:vayavaj|vayavaj]] || [[word:vayavash|vayavash]] || [[word:vayava|vayava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:vayafvath|vayafvath]] || [[word:vayafvaj|vayafvaj]] || [[word:vayafvash|vayafvash]] || [[word:vayafvaf|vayafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vayavatha|vayavatha]] || [[word:vayavaja|vayavaja]] || [[word:vayavasha|vayavasha]] || [[word:vayavaka|vayavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vayavath|vayavath]] || [[word:vayavaj|vayavaj]] || [[word:vayavash|vayavash]] || [[word:vayava|vayava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vayavathal|vayavathal]] || [[word:vayavajal|vayavajal]] || [[word:vayavashal|vayavashal]] || [[word:vayavakal|vayavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vayavathatha|vayavathatha]] || [[word:vayavajaja|vayavajaja]] || [[word:vayavashasha|vayavashasha]] || [[word:vayavaka|vayavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vayavathan|vayavathan]] || [[word:vayavajan|vayavajan]] || [[word:vayavashan|vayavashan]] || [[word:vayavakan|vayavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vayavathaoro|vayavathaoro]] || [[word:vayavajaoro|vayavajaoro]] || [[word:vayavashaoro|vayavashaoro]] || [[word:vayavakaoro|vayavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
